This is not new, it has been flaking for a while but I do see quite often now in the new CI.

There was a "fix" in https://github.com/podman-container-tools/podman/pull/27269 but that only ever addressed the error reporting not the cause of the error.

comments.body: A friendly reminder that this issue had no activity for 30 days.
